name: Opteron's First Year All About Linux - But What About Later?
description: LinuxPlanet feature assessing AMD Opteron's first year in market. Peter Kastner of Aberdeen Group characterizes Opteron as strong in scientific/technical Linux workloads but as 'a pond of only a few thousand enthusiasts'; Tom Halfhill counters that once 64-bit x86 is entrenched, Linux may retain a larger mindshare than Windows on the platform. Article maps near-term Opteron/Linux coupling and longer-term Windows x86-64 threat.

creator.name: LinuxPlanet staff (reporter); Peter Kastner and Tom Halfhill (quoted sources)
